DisqualificationTrigger: Any shortfall in the average annual turnover (even by 1 Lakh).
Submission of test reports for any panel below BIS Level-6 (e.g., Level-5 or 4).
EMD amount less than Rs. 2.75 Crores or submitted in an unapproved format.
Submitting past performance records for non-ballistic or low-threat (Below Level-5) items.
Lack of a valid Industrial License from DPIIT specifically for BR Jackets.
Failure to provide a signed Manufacturer Authorization Form (MAF) if the bidder is not the OEM.
Deviations from the specified CRPF Digital Camouflage pattern or material specs.
